name: magpie-reviewer-extension-deps
description: Pinned runtime deps for the baked-in report_findings extension (packages/review-extension) and the `pi` CLI itself, installed together so the CLI and the extension's `import`s resolve against the EXACT SAME installed copies. Versions must match packages/review-extension/package.json's resolved versions on the host (see package-lock.json) -- keep this file in lockstep with that package.json; a mismatch here is a version-skew bug, not a style nit.
